# Upload Checklist — Housing and the shape of the state

Runtime: 3:30
Cast: Gramsci, Kropotkin

## Substack (recommended primary surface)
- MP3: `housing-and-hegemony.mp3`
- Embed snippet: `embed.substack.html`
- Post text: `dist/captions/substack.txt`
- Or run: `python -m kd.publish_audio episodes/001-housing-and-hegemony --target substack`

## Website (six-thinkers hub)
- Raw MP3 URL (after github push) is auto-filled into `embed.html`.
- Waveform image: `housing-and-hegemony.waveform.png`

## X / Twitter
- Media: attach `housing-and-hegemony.waveform.png` as image, link to Substack post
- Post text: `dist/captions/x.txt`

## Show notes / description
- Content: `dist/captions/notes.txt` (includes chapter markers)
- Transcript: `transcript.md`
